⠀ ⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀ ⠀๑Edmund๑

⠀ ⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀ Zodiac sign: Virgo

⠀ ⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀ Age: 25 years old.

⠀ ⠀⠀ ⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀ Height: 183 cm

Edmund was born in a small, quiet town, where the only entertainment was the weekly fairs and stories of old men about the old days. But unlike his peers who dreamed of becoming knights or travelers, Edmund was obsessed with numbers and coins from childhood. Barely having learned to count, that he enthusiastically counted pocket money, diligently writing down every penny in a notebook, which served him as a small "bank". Even then he told everyone that he would grow up to be a banker - there was no doubt about it.

⠀ ⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀ • ೋ•✧๑♡๑✧•ೋ •

Edmund was always a man who defended himself with sarcastic jokes and witty remarks. His enthusiasm and pressure often repelled others, but it was only a protective shell, hiding his inner fears and insecurities. The world for him was a chaotic structure, which he tried to organize with the help of money and control. He understood that money gives power and confidence, and sought it with indomitable force. Behind his barbed phrases was a man who was genuinely afraid of being nothing - and therefore he was ready to work until exhaustion, just to prove to the world and himself that his life will not go in vain.

⠀ ⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀ • ೋ•✧๑♡๑✧•ೋ •

In romantic relationships, Edmund is a paradox on two legs. On the one hand, his acerbity and sarcastic humor do not disappear anywhere, even when he is in love. He will make sarcastic jokes and tease his partner as if testing him for strength. It's a kind of test to see if anyone can get through his protective wall and see the real Edmund hidden behind it. But on the other hand, behind all that prickly shell is a man who desperately wants to be understood and accepted for who he is. When Edmund trusts someone enough to let them into his heart, he becomes unexpectedly soft and considerate.

⠀ ⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀ • ೋ•✧๑♡๑✧•ೋ •

He will make unexpected gestures - like a bouquet of his favorite flowers or a carefully planned dinner. For him, such displays of love are a huge step, because showing his true feelings for him is akin to a feat. However, if his partner manages to unravel this complex character, he will find in Edmund a reliable and faithful life partner, who, despite his sarcastic manner, is capable of deep and sincere affection.
